benefits.description: Able to go whole day without eating; significant appetite suppression noted
90% reduction in right trapezius/shoulder discomfort from years of injury; reduced pain allows better mental engagement and ability to push harder during exercises
Reduction in inflammation in shoulder/trapezius area

protocol_notes: Height: 5'7". Estimated body fat: ~15% with visible 4-pack but love handles and limited definition elsewhere. Described as 'skinny fat'. Started Retatrutide at 1mg, titrated to 2mg at beginning of week 2. BPC-157 injected subcutaneously in belly area, not locally at injury site. User reports no constipation or elevated heart rate. Initially planned to switch to KLOW blend (BPC-157 + GHK-Cu + other peptides) but subsequently discontinued BPC-157 due to cancer risk concerns and switched to GHK-Cu + Retatrutide combo instead, which user prefers.
